name: Zuni Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Red Bell Pepper; Large, seeded and cut into 2 X 1/4-inch strips
2 Chiles; Medium Size (either poblano or Anaheim), seeded
1 cup Squash; Cubed (either hubbard or acorn squash)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven over medium heat, cook onion and garlic in oil until onion is tender.
2. Add bell pepper, chiles, and stir for 15 minutes.
3. Stir in squash, broth, salt, pepper, and coriander. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer until squash is tender (about 15 minutes).
5. Stir in remaining ingredients. Cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, until zucchini is tender (about 10 minutes).
